parameters.query:
UPDATE inspection_protocols
SET pdf_storage_path = '{{ $('Build HTML').item.json.storage_path }}'
WHERE id = '{{ $('Build HTML').item.json.protocol_id }}'::uuid
RETURNING id, pdf_storage_path;

parameters.text: =✅ Protocol PDF generiert    📄 {{ $('Build HTML').item.json.protocol_number }}    📁 protocols/{{ $('Build HTML').item.json.project_number }}/{{ $('Build HTML').item.json.protocol_number }}.pdf
